name: Hana Pendant Light
subtitle: Washi Paper & Brass Hardware
description: Hand-formed from a single sheet of Mino washi paper sourced from a centuries-old papermaking family in Gifu, Japan. The brass fitting is cast and hand-polished in our Copenhagen workshop. Each pendant is entirely unique — slight variations in the paper's translucency and the light it casts are features, not flaws.
care: Dust gently with a dry, soft cloth. Never use water or cleaning products directly on the washi shade. Store away from humidity.
shipping: Shipped in custom-formed protective packaging. Carefully packed to prevent deformation of the washi shade. Standard delivery 5–7 business days.
metaDescription: Hana Pendant Light — Mino washi paper and brass. Hand-formed in Japan, finished in Denmark. Limited edition. From $580 — BeautyHome.
altText: Hana pendant light with translucent washi paper shade and brass hardware, emitting warm ambient light
